name: Top Scary Pranks – VR Scare Game

reviews.review_title: Like Scary Maze but way creepier
reviews.review_description: This game totally took me back to the old Scary Maze game, but it’s like they cranked it up to 11 in VR. What I really loved was how it’s not just about cheap jump scares, the puzzles build this creepy tension, and then the scares hit you out of nowhere. Only thing is, I’d love to see more variety in the scares, maybe a whole library of different spooky vibes. If you’re into horror or just love messing with your friends in VR, you gotta check this out!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the awesome review! The Scary Maze vibe is exactly the kind of horror prank we wanted to bring into VR, simple, tense, and unforgettable.
We’re already experimenting with new MR scares that mix the real world with the creepy one.
Really appreciate your support and hope you keep terrifying your friends with it.
